data.name: IT's for Adults 🤡
data.detailed_description:
Kami is sexy. Kami is horny. But Kami is ever so bored. That is, until she finds out that her adventurous and outgoing freaky best friend Chloe has arranged a special surprise for her. It’s time for Kami to have the sort of sex she only ever hears about from her BFF. It’s her turn to be a freak in the sheets!

Key Features

• Visual Novel parody about sexual adventures of girls with demonic creatures

• Exciting porn story written by a nymphomaniac woman

• Animated and 100% uncensored sex scenes of Girl fucked by Monster

• Full HD (1920x1080 pixels) resolution graphic

• Girls' and Clown's hot moans and the environmental ambiance sounds

• Name your characters to make this story your personal one

• LOVENSE sex toys support for unforgettable pleasure & satisfaction

WISHLIST & FOLLOW FOR UPDATES!

data.short_description: Kami is bored and jealous of her sexy friend Chloe. But Chloe has a secret arranged for her special bestie. There’s a surprise visitor coming right now to Kami’s house, and if Chloe plays it right, she’ll watch her friend have the best sexual encounter of her young life!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: Pentium® 4 1.5 GHz / Athlon®
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU capable of showing images and video
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX® 9 compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+ or Kernel 3.x+ based distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
